properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is no shadow That has ever overcome Your light And there is no rival That could ever stand against Your might You've always been with us Every battle You've already won Oh, we've already won

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is no weapon That has ever left a mark on You And there is no army With the power to conquer truth You've always been with us Every battle You've already won We've already won

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Show me one thing He can't do Show me a mountain He can't move He's the God of the breakthrough And anything is possible

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Show me one thing that's too hard Show me waters He can't part He's the God of the breakthrough And anything is possible Is possible, hey

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There is a kingdom That's advancing at the speed of light And in His kingdom Every dead thing is bound to rise Oh, God our Redeemer He is faithful to revive Oh, He will revive

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Show me one thing that's too hard Show me waters He can't part He's the God of the breakthrough And anything is possible, hey, hey

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Now, all of my fear I will turn into praise Shake off despair as I sing out Your name A victory dance, I will dance out in faith I will crush disappointment and break every chain

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh, all of my fear I will turn into praise Shake off despair as I sing out Your name A victory dance, I will dance out in faith I will crush disappointment and break every chain

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh, all of my fear I will turn into praise Shake off despair as I sing out Your name A victory dance, I will dance out in faith I will crush disappointment

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Show me one thing He can't do Show me a mountain He can't move He's the God of the breakthrough Anything is possible (Yes, He is)

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Show me one thing that's too hard Show me waters He can't part He's the God of the breakthrough Anything is possible
